title: aspidium decipiens
intro: Aspidium decipiens, also known as the sensitive fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Osmundaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in treating various ailments. The health benefits of Aspidium decipiens include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Aspidium decipiens can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which is said to provide relief from its medicinal properties.
